title: Create Tacz
description: A create mod with Tacz guns and Northstar tech installed. Build a major gun with the help of the create mod as well as pump oil and go to space. The power of create is in your hands as well as power of automated guns.
body:
![create tacz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5adb8b6233de126b5b1d43ad1ab630595706b03.png)

A create mod with Tacz guns and Northstar tech installed. Build a major gun factory with the help of the create mod as well as well as pump oil and go to space, as well as be a master at chemistry. The power of create is in your hands as well as power of automated guns. This modpack who are really enjoy create and gun mods as well as space and sea exploration. Please join the discord.

![New Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80ce560f80e46abbf3b9ad27e58376dd34a83289.png)

### VERSION 1.20 IS OUT!!

# MODS/NEW THINGS ADDED

### - Chemistry
### - Mekanism 
### - New TacZ Gun pack added
**ADDED A BUNCH OF BUG FIXES AND RENDERING MACHINES TO MAKE THE GAME LESS LAGGY. ADDED SCHEMATIC FOR THOSE WHO DON'T KNOW HOW TO MAKE THE CREATE GUNS. HOPE YOU ALL ENJOY. :)**

# **MODS INCLUDED**

### - Create
### - Bunch of Create addons
### - Create Northstar
### - Time and classic guns (two extra addons added for compatibilty for create)
### - Create the Factory must Grow
### - Alex caves

~ Note ~
This mod is not intended for a survival or creative and will be updated shortly after the create addons get updated to 1.21. If you want to play this modpack for a hardcore experience or survival feeling you may need to download extra mods.
Also download 1.1.0 if you want alex caves. DO NOT PONDER FOR DESTROY IT WILL CRASH!

~ Bugs ~ 
So far no current bug Identified. Please report if bugs do occur.

# **IMPORTANT**
Mememory allocation should be at least 6424mb minimum.

### THIS MOD IS MEANT FOR CLIENT SIDE
It can be for servers however certain mods aren't added due to the mopack breaking so if you add mods and try to play the modpack then, procede with caution as the modpack might break.

Join our discord:
[https://discord.gg/](https://discord.gg/)
JOIN THE DISCORD THE ANSWER OR GIVE IDEAS FOR NEW UPDATES!

# IMPORTANT: SORRY FOR THOSE WHO MAY HAVE HAD HIGH EXPECTAIONS FOR THE UDATED PACK I HAVE BEEN VERy BUSY AND HAVE NOT GOTTEN THE PRORPPER TO TIME TO DEVELOP HOWEVER NOW I HAVE AND I WILL BE RESTARTING PROGESSION IN A FEW DAYS AND IN A COUPLE OF WEEKS THE PACK UPDATE SHOULD BE POLISHED AND READY TO GO. Also I am very sorry for the huge dely.
